description: A rectangle with rounded corners; use 'fill' or 'stroke' to apply color. Note: 'cornerRadius' here defines the shape geometry, not the clipShape modifier.

cornerStyle.description: Corner style; 'continuous' gives squircle-style corners; default 'circular'

fill.description: Fill color/style string; takes priority over stroke

stroke.description: Stroke color/style string; ignored when fill is set

strokeLineWidth.description: Stroke line width in points; default 1.0
